ListRecycleEips.eip: The EIP to query, including IPv4 EIP and IPv6 EIP.
ListRecycleEips.name: The name of the EIP to query.
ListRecycleEips.marker: The starting position for paginated list queries, a system-generated string.
ListRecycleEips.maxKeys: Maximum number of items per page, up to 1000, default is 1000.
